title: Creeper Shock: Flying TNT
description: A new threat will be there for you to evade. Which one? You know them already. ...
body:
# _"... Don't underestimate them. If you think you can beat them, you're probably wrong."_

Creeper Shock: Flying TNT is a hardcore modpack designed to endanger the player with mobs and starvation.

**⚠️ The latest modpack version is highly recommended! Some early bugs are... not satisfactory.**

# Notable changes:
- Hardcore darkness: caves are now pitch black.
- To help you with the darkness, held light sources will emit light, letting you see without placing them.
- Mobs are much smarter and faster. They have new equipment, so watch out.
- Zombies slow you down now. _Will this make them on par with the other mobs?_
- The difficulty is locked to Hard.
- Some animals will now fight back.
- An alternative to Minecraft Hardcore: You will respawn in a random place.
- Sleeping has been overhauled. Time will pass quicker during sleep and you will regenerate health.
- Nightmares.
- Mobs don't burn in the sun.
- Serene Seasons: some seasons are fertile, some are less.
- Spoiling: food now spoils. _Where can it store for longer?.._
- F3 and F5 nerfs: While the F3 menu shows little to no useful information, F5 was removed entirely. _Maybe some items will help you return your beloved debug menu..._
- Diet: a balanced diet is encouraged
- Headshot: mobs shot in the head receive additional damage and blindness. _This affects you, too..._
- Thief: stealing from villagers now have consequences. The guard villagers will make sure of that...
- Corpses: don't worry about items despawning when you die! They will stay safe and sound in your corpse.
- Utility and QOL mods to keep you at least a little sane.

**Main menu music: Elias Weber - Auf Grünen Wiesen**
